name: claudex
description: 6 harness commands + 28 agent prompts. v4.2.0 — Completion Gate protocol added. Every pipeline-finalizing agent (Reporter, QA Reporter, Integrator, Auditor, Refiner) now executes a mandatory stale-iteration-artifact scan before declaring work complete: terminated cloud resource IDs, WIP markers in supposedly-done sections, version drift, and step-status contradictions are caught before the user sees them. See harness/references/completion-gate-protocol.md. v4.1.0 baseline — Meta-Loop is the default execution model: every /harness request becomes a phase-book, running work→verify→apply cycles until every phase's DoD passes; small requests degrade to a 1-phase book (backward compatible). Capability tier detection (Standard / Advanced / Elite) drives round limits, QA threshold, Sentinel and Auditor activation, and Scale file thresholds. Commit/push/deploy/PR intents in the request become terminal phases automatically (auto-commit is off otherwise). Commands: /harness (SINGLE/TEAM builder + Phase Verifier + Sentinel + Auditor), /harness-docs (5-agent documentation), /harness-review (5-agent code review + git handoff), /harness-qa (functional QA with Playwright), /design (3-dial frontend design), /claude-dashboard (statusline).
